name: Coeptis Therapeutics Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I As discussed elsewhere in this Annual Report on Form 10-K, pursuant to the Merger, we acquired our primary operating subsidiary Coeptis Therapeutics, Inc. Since prior to the Merger the Company was a shell company, the business description below is a description of the Companys business based on our subsidiaries operations. Company History General . We were originally incorporated in the British Virgin Islands on November 27, 2018, under the name Bull Horn Holdings Corp. On October 27, 202...
